title: Load user data successfully
preconditions: ["User is logged in and user_id exists in SharedPreferences"]
test_steps: ["Simulate loading user data by setting up mock SharedPreferences with a valid user_id.", "Call loadUserData() method."]
expected_result: ["Toast message 'Errore: utente non loggato' should not appear.", "All profile fields should be populated with mock user data."]

title: Load user data fails due to missing user_id
preconditions: ["User is not logged in and no user_id exists in SharedPreferences"]
test_steps: ["Simulate loading user data by setting up mock SharedPreferences without a user_id.", "Call loadUserData() method."]
expected_result: ["Toast message 'Errore: utente non loggato' should appear.", "No profile fields should be populated."]

title: Update user data successfully
preconditions: ["User is logged in and all required fields are filled correctly"]
test_steps: ["Fill all required fields in the profile form with valid data.", "Click on the 'Aggiorna Profilo' button."]
expected_result: ["Toast message 'Profilo aggiornato con successo' should appear.", "No errors or exceptions should occur."]

title: Update user data fails due to invalid email format
preconditions: ["User is logged in and an invalid email is entered"]
test_steps: ["Enter an invalid email address in the email field.", "Click on the 'Aggiorna Profilo' button."]
expected_result: ["Toast message 'Inserisci un'email valida' should appear.", "No other errors or exceptions should occur."]

title: Update user data fails due to missing user_id
preconditions: ["User is not logged in and no user_id exists in SharedPreferences"]
test_steps: ["Simulate updating user data by setting up mock SharedPreferences without a user_id.", "Call updateUserData() method."]
expected_result: ["Toast message 'Errore: utente non loggato' should appear.", "No other errors or exceptions should occur."]

title: Logout user successfully
expected_result: ["Intent to LoginActivity should start.", "Current activity should finish.", "SharedPreferences should have 'user_id' removed."]

title: OnDestroyView cleans up properly
preconditions: ["Fragment is created and attached to an activity"]
test_steps: ["Attach the fragment to an activity.", "Call onDestroyView() method."]
